creator: Nikita Fair
source_text:
Waffle Breakfast Sandwiches 🧇
(Makes 10 Sandwiches) 

Macros Per Sandwich: 
- 375 Calories
- 45g Protein 
- 21g Carbs 
- 12g Fat 

Ingredients: 
- 30oz Ground Chicken Breast (850g)
- 1 Tbsp Garlic Salt (15g)
- 0.5 Tbsp Smoked Paprika (3g)
- 1 Tbsp Onion Powder (7g)
- 1 Tbsp Red Pepper Flakes (5g)
- 0.5 Tbsp Black Pepper (4g)
- 2 Tbsps Maple Syrup (30g)
- 3.3 Cups Egg Whites (810g)
- Fresh Chives (10g)
- 10 Slices Fat Free American Cheese
- 20 Kodiak Homestyle Power Waffles 

Freezing Instructions ❄️:
1. Wrap the sandwiches in aluminum foil or put them in an airtight freezer bag
2. Place them in the freezer and keep frozen for up to 3 month 

Reheating Instructions🔥: 
1. Take out a frozen sandwich and wrap it in a wet paper towel 
2. Microwave it on a plate for 3-4 minutes

@kodiakcakes #KodiakPartner
notes: Agent-labeled from the frozen Instagram description before viewing parser output.
Only freezing and reheating directions are present, so the absent primary preparation method keeps this a fallback case.
Accepted exactly with the existing creator-independent parser; no parser change was needed.
